commands.author: clawSean

target.title: fix(tts): allow trusted local media in message_tool_only mode
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes openclaw/openclaw#83636.

Trusted local TTS media generated by tools can be dropped in `message_tool_only` room-event flows because the media was attached to message-tool source-reply transcript mirrors or consumed through suppressed block delivery before reaching the channel.

## The Fix

- Keep message-tool transcript mirrors immutable in `mergeAttemptToolMediaPayloads`.
- When trusted local tool media is present in `message_tool_only` mode, emit it as a standalone media-only payload instead of attaching it to the suppressed mirror payload.
- Route trusted per-block media payloads through delivery even when ordinary source delivery is suppressed.
- Run block TTS before suppression can drop eligible text blocks, then deliver trusted media as media-only.
- Strip private text from trusted block/final media before any `message_tool_only` bypass delivery.
- Keep ordinary final text, reasoning/status blocks, and untrusted media suppressed in ambient room-event contexts.

## Changed Files

- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.ts`
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.test.ts`
- `src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts`
- `src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: trusted local TTS media was queued by the tool/block path but could be attached to a `message_tool_only` source-reply mirror or blocked by suppressed block delivery before channel dispatch. The fix must deliver trusted local media as media-only while keeping private text and untrusted media suppressed.
- Real environment tested: PR head `0c5b76a444e77cf28062acd78ba04c5342aa11c6` in a real OpenClaw checkout on Linux. The merge proof imports the actual patched `mergeAttemptToolMediaPayloads` implementation with a real temp local media file. The dispatch-path proof uses the focused OpenClaw Vitest dispatch harness for `dispatchReplyFromConfig` with the dispatcher boundary stubbed, matching the existing repo test pattern for this delivery policy.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  - `pnpm exec tsx --eval '<one-off script importing src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.ts, creating a real temp .opus file, and calling mergeAttemptToolMediaPayloads with sourceReplyDeliveryMode="message_tool_only" + toolTrustedLocalMedia=true>'`
  - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`
  - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-payloads.test.ts`
  - `pnpm check:test-types`
  - `git diff --check`
  - `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.test.ts`
  - `pnpm exec oxlint src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.test.ts`
- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output): copied node/tsx console output from the real merge-helper proof command, followed by focused dispatch validation output.
  ```text
  [MERGE] payloadCount=2 mirrorText="source reply mirror text" mediaText=undefined trusted=true audioAsVoice=true metadata=undefined
  [MERGE] mediaUrl=<real-temp-local-media> mediaUrls=1

  [test] starting test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
       Tests  6 passed (6)

  [test] starting test/vitest/vitest.auto-reply.config.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
       Tests  217 passed (217)
  [test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 25.83s

  [test] starting test/vitest/vitest.auto-reply.config.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
       Tests  48 passed (48)
  [test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 30.77s
  ```
- Observed result after fix: the actual merge helper leaves the source-reply mirror text intact and emits a separate trusted local media payload with `mediaText=undefined` and no metadata. Focused dispatch regressions pass for ClawSweeper's follow-up findings: trusted media-only block payloads deliver before empty-text suppression; text block TTS can generate and deliver trusted media under `message_tool_only`; ordinary block text/reasoning/status stay suppressed; trusted block/final text+media near misses are stripped to media-only; untrusted block/final media stays suppressed; explicit command terminal replies still deliver as-is. The test config now uses supported TTS mode `mode: "all"` instead of a schema-bypass mode.
- What was not tested: a live dynamic `tts` tool auto-delivery run on this PR branch through a production Telegram/Discord gateway was not run from this contributor environment because that requires deploying/restarting a live OpenClaw gateway or a maintainer/Mantis transport proof run.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: the dispatch-path proof stubs the channel send boundary through the existing focused test harness, so it proves the patched in-process delivery decision and payload shape, not a full multi-process Telegram/Discord transport recording. Prior private live Telegram voice-note proof covers the target voice-note transport prerequisite, but it predates this exact PR head and is not publicly inspectable.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): ClawSweeper re-review on `a069d38f11b` found that pending trusted media-only `onBlockReply` payloads could still be dropped before the media check, that the test config used unsupported TTS mode `block`, and that live after-fix transport proof was still ideal. This patch adds regressions for the code findings and updates the proof to the new head.

## Validation

- `pnpm exec tsx --eval <merge-helper proof script>` — passed; real temp local media split into trusted media-only payload.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts` — passed, 2 shards, 223 tests.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-payloads.test.ts` — passed, 1 shard, 48 tests.
- `pnpm check:test-types` — passed.
- `git diff --check` — passed.
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.test.ts` — passed.
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/tool-media-payloads.test.ts` — passed.
- `pnpm check:changed` — not rerun in this pass; earlier local Crabbox delegation failed before code checks with `selected binary failed basic --version/--help sanity checks`.

## Notes

This keeps the scope narrow: trusted local media gets a deliverable media-only path for merge, block, and final routes, while ordinary source replies and untrusted media stay suppressed under `message_tool_only`.

## Current review state

Author patch for ClawSweeper's code findings is pushed at `0c5b76a444e77cf28062acd78ba04c5342aa11c6`. Next action: rerun proof/CI and request ClawSweeper re-review. Maintainer/Mantis live Telegram or Discord transport proof is still the ideal end-to-end auto-delivery proof if maintainers require full live evidence.
target.author: clawsean

commands.reason: matching ClawSweeper response comment already exists
